articles.title: Blue Origin still doesn’t know why its New Glenn rocket blew up last month
articles.description: But the company is still claiming that New Glenn will return to flight this year.

articles.title: Tesla starts testing Cybercab without pedals or a steering wheel in Austin
articles.description: The company may finally be ready to try to deliver on Elon Musk's years-long promise of launching a robotaxi network of its own.

articles.title: X now offers an MCP server to make its platform easier for AI tools to use
articles.description: X has launched a hosted MCP server, making it easier for developers to connect AI applications with the company’s API.

articles.title: Arcturus could halve the grid’s electrical losses using its nano-infused copper
articles.description: Stealthy startup Arcturus uses lasers to infuse carbon nanomaterials into copper, dramatically improving its ability to conduct electricity.

articles.title: Podcasting platform Riverside enters the newsletter publishing game
articles.description: Users will be able use AI to create newsletters based on their recordings.

articles.title: Amazon launches new $1 billion FDE org, following OpenAI and Anthropic
articles.description: Engineers on the new team will embed within companies to deploy purpose-built agents, focusing on fast deployments and customer self-sufficiency.

articles.title: Your brand deserves its own stage — Side Events at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
articles.description: From October 10-16, host a Side Event and command the room during the week of TechCrunch Disrupt 2026.

articles.title: Lumo, Proton’s privacy-focused AI chatbot, gets an upgrade
articles.description: Proton's Lumo 2.0 is dropping this week, giving users a broader variety of capabilities.

articles.title: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
articles.description: OKX is bringing together payments, identity, and reputation into a marketplace for AI agents.

articles.title: The AI jobs debate just got messier
articles.description: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.

articles.title: Vibe-coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
articles.description: Wix-owned vibe-coding platform Base44 has started rolling out its own AI model — with hopes that it will eventually outperform frontier models.

articles.title: Chamath Palihapitiya raises $135M Series A for his AI coding startup, takes CEO role
articles.description: VCs remain thirsty to fund AI coding startups. This one, founded by investor Chamath Palihapitiya, is no exception.

articles.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
articles.description: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

articles.title: Watch out, Amazon: The Kobo eReader now has a Goodreads rival
articles.description: Kobo users can now automatically sync their reading progress to StoryGraph, making it easier to track books, reading stats, and challenges without relying on Amazon’s Goodreads.

articles.title: Waymo and Uber quietly part ways in Phoenix
articles.description: Uber said it is readying the launch of a separate autonomous vehicle partnership in the city, but did not name the partner.

articles.title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
articles.description: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.

articles.title: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘RAMageddon’
articles.description: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.

articles.title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
articles.description: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.

articles.title: Cursor now has a mobile app for guiding your coding agent on the go
articles.description: Cursor has launched a new mobile app for remote oversight over coding agents.

articles.title: Trump administration threatens 92 GW of new electricity supply with red tape
articles.description: The Trump administration's moves threaten $121 billion in new solar and wind power, two energy sources that are the biggest contributors to new capacity in the U.S.

articles.title: Florida bans local governments from pursuing net-zero emissions goals
articles.description: Gov. Ron DeSantis calls it a crackdown on "radical climate policies."

articles.description: Join us on the livestream at 1 pm ET and ask questions about the aftermath of New Glenn.

articles.description: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.

articles.description: South Korea targets physical AI lead and commercial humanoid robots by 2028.

articles.description: The EU wants Google to share search data with competitors and open up AI on Android, but Google alleges major privacy risks.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **太空探索受挫**：蓝色起源仍未查明其“新格伦”火箭上月爆炸的原因，显示重型火箭研发仍面临技术挑战。
2. **自动驾驶新进展**：特斯拉在奥斯汀开始测试无方向盘和踏板的Cybercab，向全无人驾驶商业化迈出关键一步。
3. **AI与平台生态加速**：X平台推出MCP服务器以便AI工具接入；Proton更新隐私AI聊天机器人Lumo；Google Gemini向美国用户免费开放个性化AI图像生成功能。
4. **能源与材料突破**：Arcturus利用纳米铜材料可将电网电力损耗减半，有望大幅提升能源传输效率。
5. **科技巨头资本动向**：亚马逊成立10亿美元新组织（FDE），追随OpenAI和Anthropic布局前沿AI；AI编程初创公司Base44发布自研模型，Chamath Palihapitiya为其AI编码初创公司筹集1.35亿美元并出任CEO。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：特斯拉正式启动无方向盘/踏板自动驾驶出租车测试，标志着全无人驾驶商业化进入实操阶段。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **模型与框架进展**：Hugging Face发布多项技术更新，包括跨分布密度与分数统一的Transformer模型DiScoFormer、一键部署vLLM服务器、以及利用NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel加速Transformer微调；同时推出FFASR语音识别基准排行榜，并强调模型页面集成所有评估结果及“专业化不可避免”的趋势。

2. **企业合作与产品升级**：OpenAI宣布与惠普（HP Inc.）建立“Frontier”战略合作伙伴关系，预览下一代模型GPT-5.6 Sol，并探讨AI代理如何改变工作模式；谷歌则推出新版Google Finance应用及AI全栈专家问答，强调英国需打造AI先驱国家以提升生产力。

3. **行业趋势与人才洞察**：OpenAI分析ChatGPT采用率扩张情况，发布欧洲AI劳动力机会地图，并披露一项18年历史的核心转储流行病学漏洞修复；强调AI专业化、全栈能力及代理化转型成为当前发展关键。

**今日最值得关注**：OpenAI与惠普的战略合作及GPT-5.6 Sol的预览，标志着AI巨头与硬件厂商的深度绑定，同时“专业化不可避免”与“AI代理转型工作”两大论点正重塑行业格局。

articles.title: China to introduce new train timetable from July 1, including high-speed train service between Beijing and Urumqi

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. [重点] 中国将于7月1日起实施新的列车运行图。  
2. [重点] 新运行图将包括北京至乌鲁木齐间的高速列车服务。  
3. [重点] 此次调整旨在优化铁路运输效率，提升区域连通性。  

总结：今日最值得关注的发展是中国铁路网络进一步扩展，北京至乌鲁木齐高速列车服务将正式开通，标志着西部交通基础设施的显著提升。
